title: ageratina villarrealii
intro: Ageratina villarrealii, also known as Yerba de la Flor de Calabaza, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ageratina villarrealii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
